name: audit-pack-emit --format markdown writes bundle.md with a human-review heading for the bundle id per §2.24
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack-emit.sh" --format markdown --commit-sha abc123 --generated-at 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z --out-dir out 2>err.txt && grep -q 'Audit Pack abc123-2026-05-25T00:00:00Z' out/abc123-2026-05-25T00:00:00Z/bundle.md && echo ok 1>&2
